ddls:
CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Full name of the client */,
  "street_address" TEXT /* Street address of the client */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the client is located */,
  "zip" INTEGER /* Zip code of the client's location */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the client */,
  "organization_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the organization the client is affiliated with */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the client */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the client */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the client */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the client record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the client record was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the client (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clients_organization_id FOREIGN KEY ("organization_id") REFERENCES organizations ("organization_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "organizations" (
  "organization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organization */,
  "organization_name" TEXT /* Name of the organization */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the organization */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the organization */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the organization */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the organization */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the organization */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the organization record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the organization record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("organization_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "services" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service */,
  "service_name" TEXT /* Name of the service */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the service */,
  "cost" TEXT /* Cost of the service */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the service in minutes */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the service record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the service record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "service_deliveries" (
  "delivery_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service delivery */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client receiving the service */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service being delivered */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service provider */,
  "delivery_date" TEXT /* Date the service was delivered */,
  "delivery_status" TEXT /* Status of the service delivery (e.g., pending, completed, cancelled) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the service delivery record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the service delivery record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("delivery_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_deliveries_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_id") REFERENCES services ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_deliveries_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_deliveries_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES service_providers ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "client_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client interaction */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client involved in the interaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who recorded the interaction */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date the interaction occurred */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., phone call, email, meeting) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes about the interaction */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the interaction record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the interaction record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_client_interactions_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_client_interactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, service provider, client) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "client_service_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service history entry */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service provider */,
  "service_date" TEXT /* Date the service was provided */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the service history entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the service history entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_client_service_history_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_client_service_history_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES service_providers ("provider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_client_service_history_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_id") REFERENCES services ("service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "service_providers" (
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service provider */,
  "provider_name" TEXT /* Name of the service provider */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the service provider */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the service provider */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the service provider */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the service provider */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the service provider */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the service provider record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the service provider record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "service_delivery_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service delivery status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the service delivery status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the service delivery status */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the status record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the status record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interaction_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the interaction type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the interaction type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the interaction type record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the interaction type record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service */,
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the interaction */,
  "delivery_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service delivery */,
  "metric" TEXT /* Specific metric or KPI being tracked */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the analytics record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the analytics record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_interaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("interaction_id") REFERENCES client_interactions ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_delivery_id FOREIGN KEY ("delivery_id") REFERENCES service_deliveries ("delivery_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_id") REFERENCES services ("service_id")
)
